08.08.2017 153 498(अ) 07.07.2009 186 1035(अ) 18.08.2017 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th November, 2017 G.S.R. 1451(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Service Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rules (1) and (2) of Rule 4 of Indian Forest Service (Cadre) Rules, 1966, the Central Government in consultation with the Government of Haryana hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1966, namely :- 1. (i) These regulations shall be called the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) seventh Amendment Regulations, 2017. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1966, in the Schedule, for the heading "Haryana" and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely :- -- 4 of 11 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 5 SENIOR DUTY POSTS UNDER THE STATE GOVERNMENT 36 Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Head of Forests Force 1 Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Chief Wildlife Warden 1 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests, Forestry 1 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Development) 1 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (FCA & CAMPA) 1 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Budget, Planning, Project Formulation) 1 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Administration) 1 Chief Conservator Forests (Administration) 1 Chief Conservator Forests (Headquarters) 1 Chief Conservator Forests (Protection-1) 1 Chief Conservator Forests (Protection-2) 1 Chief Conservator Forests (Wildlife-1) 1 Chief Conservator Forests (Wildlife-2) 1 Conservator of Forests, North Circle 1 Conservator of Forests, South Circle 1 Conservator of Forests, West Circle 1 Conservator of Forests, Central Rohtak 1 Conservator of Forests, M & E 1 Conservator of Forests, Publicity and Training 1 Conservator of Forests, Headquarters 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Territorial) 16 1. Total Senior Duty Posts 36 2. Central Deputation Reserve not exceeding 20% of Item 1 above 7 3. State Deputation Reserve not exceeding 25% of Item 1 above 9 4. Training Reserve not exceeding 3.5% of Item 1 above 1 5. Leave Reserve and Junior Posts Reserve not exceeding 16.5% of Item 1 above 5 6. Posts to be filled by promotion under Rule 8 of the Indian Forest Service (Recruitment) Rules 1966 not exceeding 33 1/3 % of Item 1, 2, 3 and 4 above 17 7. Posts to be filled up by Direct Recruitment (Item 1+2+3+4+5-6) 41 Total Authorised Strength (Item 6+7 above) 58” [F. No. 16016/04/2017-AIS-II (A)] JYOTSNA GUPTA, Under Secy. Note-1: Prior to the issue of this Notification, the total Authorized Strength of the IFS cadre of Haryana was 69. Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th November, 2017 G.S.R. 1452(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951) the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Haryana hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Forest Service (Pay) Rules, 2016 namely:— 1. (i) These rules shall be called the Indian Forest Service (Pay) seventh Amendment Rules, 2017. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Forest Service (Pay) Rules, 2016:- (a) In Schedule II- A Posts carrying pay above the Time Scale in the Indian Forest Service under the State Governments, in the Table, for the entry “Haryana” appearing in the first column and the corresponding entry in the second column, the following shall be substituted, namely:- “Haryana 1 Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Head of Forests Force Level 17 in the Pay Matrix 2 Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Chief Wildlife Warden Level 16 in the Pay Matrix 3 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests, Forestry Level 15 in the Pay Matrix 4 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Development) Level 15 in the Pay Matrix 5 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (FCA & CAMPA) Level 15 in the Pay Matrix 6 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Budget, Planning, Project Formulation) Level 15 in the Pay Matrix 7 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Administration) Level 15 in the Pay Matrix 10 Chief Conservator Forests (Administration) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix 11 Chief Conservator Forests (Headquarters) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix 12 Chief Conservator Forests (Protection-1) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix 13 Chief Conservator Forests (Protection-2) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix 14 Chief Conservator Forests (Wildlife-1) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix 15 Chief Conservator Forests (Wildlife-2) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix 23 Conservator of Forests, North Circle Level 13A in the Pay Matrix 24 Conservator of Forests, South Circle Level 13A in the Pay Matrix 25 Conservator of Forests, West Circle Level 13A in the Pay Matrix 26 Conservator of Forests, Central Rohtak Level 13A in the Pay Matrix 27 Conservator of Forests, M & E Level 13A in the Pay Matrix 28 Conservator of Forests, Publicity and Training Level 13A in the Pay Matrix 29 Conservator of Forests, Headquarters Level 13A in the Pay Matrix (b) In Schedule-II B, Posts carrying pay in the Senior Scale of the Indian Forest Service under the State Governments including posts carrying special pay in addition to pay in the Time Scale for the entry Haryana, the following shall be substituted, namely:- 1 “Deputy Conservator of Forests (Territorial)” [F.
